## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Create standardized modal and drawer templates for confirmations/forms/details
- Apply to mock flows: withdraw confirm, strategy change confirm, activity detail
- Ensure keyboard and focus trap behavior
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Modal max width 560px; drawer width 360px on desktop, full on mobile
  - Focus trap active when open; escape key closes unless destructive action pending
  - Header/body/footer spacing follows 16/24/16 pattern

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Modal and drawer components built and documented
- [ ] Used in at least 3 mock flows
- [ ] Accessibility checks for focus and keyboard pass
- [ ] PR includes screenshots for open/close/action states

## Suggested GitHub labels

`frontend`, `page-design`, `components`, `priority-high`
